title: Arcane Heart
description: Arcane Heart: a captivating Minecraft mod of enchantment and magic. Craft unique Spellpages, unlock 50+ mystical spells, and embrace boundless possibilities. Redefine your realm with Arcane Heart's arcane power.
body:
### Arcane Heart
Introducing Arcane Heart, a captivating mod that brings an abundance of enchanting magic-themed items to the realm of Minecraft. Prepare to embark on a mystical journey filled with endless possibilities and unleash your creativity like never before. With Arcane Heart, your Minecraft experience will be elevated to extraordinary heights.

Discover a revolutionary system of Mana Drops and Spellpages, designed to grant you unparalleled control over the forces of magic. Immerse yourself in a world where the boundaries of imagination are shattered, and wield the power of spells at your fingertips.

Craft a diverse array of Spellpages, each possessing its own unique abilities and enchanting effects. These Spellpages will serve as your gateway to a realm of unimaginable possibilities, allowing you to shape the very fabric of your gameplay.

Delve into the Spell Book, a tome brimming with ancient knowledge and arcane secrets. Within its pages, you will find a treasure trove of over 50 distinct spells, each carefully crafted with its own resource costs and cooldowns. From the simplicity of launching fireballs to the marvel of teleportation, the Spell Book will grant you the power to manipulate the elements and forge your own destiny. (Please note: Work in progress, with more spells on the horizon!)

Harness the might of Mana Potions, potent elixirs that bestow upon you an assortment of extraordinary effects. These mystical concoctions will imbue you with the essence of magic, allowing you to soar to new heights, become nigh invulnerable, or wield devastating arcane abilities. (Please note: Work in progress, with additional effects yet to come!)

Prepare to embark on an enchanting adventure like no other. With the Arcane Heart mod, the realm of Minecraft will never be the same again. Embrace the magic, shape your destiny, and let the arcane energies flow through your very core. The power to redefine your world is in your hands. Are you ready to embrace the arcane?

### Implementation Progress

## Tools

+ Mortar and Pestle
 > Crafted with Three Stone, Earth Drops, a Stick, and Two Arcane Drops has 150 uses 
+ Mana Bowl
 > Crafted with Three of any Wood, and Two Arcane Drops
+ Bigger Bottle 
 > Crafted with Five Glass Blocks and a Copper Ingot  

## Spellpages

+ Magelight
 > Crafted with Fire Drops, and Order Drops 

## Mana Types
+ Arcane 
 > Crafted with Amethyst, Blaze powder, Glowstone dust and Ghast tear
+ Fire 
 > Crafted with Arcane, Blaze powder, and Magma Cream
+  Earth
 > Crafted with Arcane, Any Dirt, and Any Rock(note Cobblestone will not work)
+ Water 
 > Crafted with Arcane, Any Fish and a Bucket of Water
+ Air
 > Crafted with Arcane, Feather, and Phantom Membrane
+ Entropy
 > Crafted with Arcane, Any Skull, and Rotten Flesh
+ Order
 > Crafted with Arcane, Any Golden Apple, and Nether Quartz


#  Work In Progress

+ Crafting recipes 


##### **In order to run you will need Curios Api and Geckolib** 
##### ***Built In MCreator***
